name: Longevity Health Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I . Unless the context requires otherwise, references in this Annual Report on Form 10-K (this Annual Report) to the Company, Longevity, we, us, or our, on or after July 14, 2023 are intended to refer to Longevity Health Holdings, Inc., a Delaware corporation, and its consolidated subsidiaries and prior to such date are intended to refer to Carmell Regen Med Corporation (formerly Carmell Therapeutics Corporation), a Delaware corporation, (Legacy Carmell).
